  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, concision, and tone without altering higher-level structure or content.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing should preserve accurate expressions of uncertainty and preliminary status where stated.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid strengthening or overstating claims beyond what the reported results support.",
    "RX.3": "The scope is limited to stylistic polish, so changes should not introduce new content, restructure sections, or modify substantive claims.",
    "RX.4": "Edits should not introduce wording that could mislead or cause misuse, especially around comparative performance or efficiency.",
    "RX.5": "All reported figures, dataset names, and baselines must be preserved exactly for traceability to the original text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, concision, and tone without altering higher-level structure or content.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should preserve accurate expressions of uncertainty and preliminary status where stated.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid strengthening or overstating claims beyond what the reported results support.
rationale.RX.3: The scope is limited to stylistic polish, so changes should not introduce new content, restructure sections, or modify substantive claims.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should not introduce wording that could mislead or cause misuse, especially around comparative performance or efficiency.
rationale.RX.5: All reported figures, dataset names, and baselines must be preserved exactly for traceability to the original text.
